rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TESTAMENTARY TRUST ESTABLISHED FOR HAROLD JEROME HAYNIE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Fifth Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Its Settlement; For Appoval Of Fees To Trustee And
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/09/2020. No notes will be sent. The following isssues must be addressed: 1) No declaration regarding the petitioner or her counsel's retention of original bank statements is on file. See LRSF 14.93(D). 2) As several requests for special notice appear to remain on file in the related PES-99-271821 case, those requesters must receive notice of the hearing with a copy of the petition unless their withdrawals or waivers are filed. 3) The prayer for relief in the petition and proopsed orders submitted by the petitioner do not refer to reducing the bond to $97,000. 4) A supplemental declaration is required to explain why the attorney's fees are substantially higher than those approved with the 4th account. The petitioner and her attorney are reminded of their obligation under CRC 1.201 to disclose only the last 4 digits of financial account numbers.
